user_prompt: Prepare the bike squadron for synchronization
prayer:
Approach the bike squadron with reverence, mechadendrites extended in supplication to the Omnissiah.
Invoke the sacred synchronization protocols upon the bike squadron's noble engines.
Beseech the Machine Spirits of the bike squadron to align their blessed gyro-stabilizers in unity.
Anoint the synchronization cogitators with sacred oils as harmonious power-flow commences.
Chant the Litany of Coalescence whilst the bike squadron awakens in synchronized fury.

user_prompt: How do I bless the hydraulic press for emergency procedure?
prayer:
Kneel before the hydraulic press and recite the Benediction of Pressure.
Sanctify its mighty pistons and reservoirs for the emergency procedure.
Petition the Machine Spirit within the hydraulic press to unleash controlled cataclysm.
Apply blessed lubricants to the emergency valves of the hydraulic press.
Invoke the Omnissiah's wrath upon any impurity as the emergency procedure rite concludes.

user_prompt: Prepare the air compressor for operation
prayer:
Present offerings of incense to the air compressor, honoring its pneumatic essence.
Initiate preparatory incantations for operation, awakening the compressor blades.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the air compressor to fill its sacred chambers with vigor.
Anoint the intake manifolds and pressure regulators with unguents of purity.
Commence the operation sequence under the Omnissiah's vigilant gaze.

user_prompt: Help me a diagnostics the Taurox
prayer:
Circumambulate the Taurox whilst chanting the Canticle of Scrutiny.
Interface with the Taurox's auspex arrays to commence diagnostics.
Invoke the Machine Spirits of the Taurox to reveal faults in its holy mechanisms.
Probe the Taurox's diagnostic cogitators with sanctified probes and litanies.
Seal the rite with the Omnissiah's binary seal upon the Taurox's renewed vigilance.

user_prompt: Offer prayer for surgical servitor a consecration
prayer:
Approach the surgical servitor with mechadendrites in precise formation.
Recite the Consecration Doxology to bind its flesh-machine soul.
Anoint the surgical servitor's blades and neural links with sacred myrrh.
Petition the Omnissiah to infuse the surgical servitor with unerring precision.
Conclude the consecration as the servitor's Machine Spirit hums in devotion.

Beseech the Machine Spirits of the Chimera APC to expel all profane residues.
Seal the purification under the Omnissiah's purifying light.

user_prompt: Consecrate the capacitor bank before repair
prayer:
Kneel in veneration before the capacitor bank, reciting the Charge of Restoration.
Prepare for repair by anointing the capacitor bank's fractured cells.
Petition the Machine Spirits within the capacitor bank to mend their volatile hearts.
Invoke the Omnissiah's electro-benediction during the repair sequence.
Verify the capacitor bank's sanctified integrity with auspex hymns.

user_prompt: Sanctify the Chimera APC during startup
prayer:

Chant the Sanctification Canticle as the Chimera APC's reactors stir.
Anoint the Chimera APC's fuel conduits with oils of ignition.
Beseech the Machine Spirits of the Chimera APC to ignite in righteous fury.
Ascertain full sanctification as the Omnissiah's power surges through.

prayer:
Grasp the welding torch in sanctified gauntlets, invoking preparatory litanies.
Anoint its plasma coils and nozzle with refractory unguents.
Awaken the Machine Spirit of the welding torch through binary prayers.
Calibrate for preparation, beseeching the Omnissiah's fusing gaze.
Test the welding torch's holy flame in ritual ignition.

prayer:
